metadata.name: Decayed — Jadar end-step trigger creates Zombie token with Decayed
metadata.description: Tests the Decayed (CR 702.147a) token creation path via Jadar, Ghoulcaller of Nephalia. Turn 1: P1 casts Jadar ({1}{B}, Legendary 1/1). After both players pass priority, Jadar resolves onto P1's battlefield. P1 then passes priority through each intermediate step (BeginningOfCombat, DeclareAttackers with no attackers jumping to EndOfCombat, EndOfCombat, PostCombatMain) to reach the End step. At the beginning of P1's End step, end_step_actions() fires Jadar's AtBeginningOfYourEndStep triggered ability and places it on the stack (CR 603.1). The engine fix (generic AtBeginningOfYourEndStep sweep in end_step_actions) is confirmed working — stack.count=1 assertion passes. However, a second gap exists: resolution looks up the effect in obj.characteristics.triggered_abilities, which is not populated from CardDefinition.AbilityDefinition::Triggered entries by enrich_spec_from_def. The token creation at resolution therefore does not execute. See disputes.
metadata.generation_notes: Jadar, Ghoulcaller of Nephalia (crates/engine/src/cards/defs/jadar_ghoulcaller_of_nephalia.rs): {1}{B}, Legendary Creature — Human Wizard 1/1. AbilityDefinition::Triggered { trigger_condition: TriggerCondition::AtBeginningOfYourEndStep, effect: Effect::CreateToken { spec: zombie_decayed_token_spec(1) }, intervening_if: None }. PARTIAL FIX: end_step_actions() in turn_actions.rs now has a generic AtBeginningOfYourEndStep carddef sweep (lines ~892-960). This sweep fires correctly — the trigger is placed on the stack (stack.count=1 assertion passes). REMAINING GAP: resolution.rs StackObjectKind::TriggeredAbility resolution path (lines ~1773-1830) looks up the effect in obj.characteristics.triggered_abilities.get(ability_index). This field is populated by the builder from spec.triggered_abilities and keyword expansions, but NOT from AbilityDefinition::Triggered entries in CardDefinition. enrich_spec_from_def() (replay_harness.rs) also does not translate AbilityDefinition::Triggered into triggered_abilities on the spec. Result: ability_index=0 hits an empty Vec and returns None; the CreateToken effect is never executed. Fix needed: resolution.rs TriggeredAbility branch should fall back to card_registry when characteristics.triggered_abilities.get(ability_index) returns None, using obj.card_id to look up the CardDefinition and finding the Nth AbilityDefinition::Triggered entry. Step advancement: from PreCombatMain with empty stack, one priority_round advances one step. The path PreCombatMain→End requires 5 priority_rounds: (1)→BeginningOfCombat, (2)→DeclareAttackers, (3) no attackers→EndOfCombat (advance_step skips blockers/damage), (4)→PostCombatMain, (5)→End. Token card name per zombie_decayed_token_spec: 'Zombie'. Mana pool: { black: 1, colorless: 1 } for {1}{B} cost.

disputes.description: REMAINING ENGINE GAP (after partial fix): The resolution path for StackObjectKind::TriggeredAbility in resolution.rs (lines ~1773-1830) looks up the trigger effect from obj.characteristics.triggered_abilities.get(ability_index). This Vec is populated by the builder from spec.triggered_abilities and keyword expansions, but NOT from AbilityDefinition::Triggered entries in CardDefinition.abilities. enrich_spec_from_def() in replay_harness.rs also does not translate AbilityDefinition::Triggered into triggered_abilities on the spec. As a result, when Jadar's end-step trigger (ability_index=0 from the CardDef sweep) resolves, triggered_abilities[0] is None, triggered_effect is None, and the CreateToken effect is never executed. The Zombie token is never created. The stack.count=1 assertion (trigger IS placed on stack by the partial fix) passes. The zones.battlefield.p1 includes Zombie assertion fails. Fix: add a card_registry fallback in the TriggeredAbility resolution branch: when characteristics.triggered_abilities.get(ability_index) is None, look up obj.card_id in the card_registry and find the Nth AbilityDefinition::Triggered entry (ability_index is the index into the subset of Triggered AbilityDefinitions). Alternatively, populate characteristics.triggered_abilities from AbilityDefinition::Triggered in enrich_spec_from_def and the builder. CR basis: CR 603.1 — triggered ability fires when event occurs; CR 608.2 — ability resolves and effect executes.

script.step_note: P1 casts Jadar, Ghoulcaller of Nephalia ({1}{B}). Both players pass priority. Jadar resolves onto the battlefield. P1 then passes priority through five steps to reach the End step where Jadar's trigger fires.

actions.description: Initial: Jadar in P1 hand, battlefield empty, stack empty, P1 has {1}{B} in pool.
actions.note: P1 has {1}{B} in mana pool. Battlefield is empty.
CR 601.2: P1 casts Jadar, Ghoulcaller of Nephalia paying {1}{B}.

actions.description: After casting Jadar: Jadar on stack (count=1), P1 hand empty.

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both players pass priority. CR 608.2: Jadar resolves and enters the battlefield.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Jadar enters the battlefield under P1's control as a 1/1 Legendary Human Wizard. No ETB trigger.

actions.description: After Jadar resolves: Jadar on P1 battlefield, stack empty, life totals unchanged.
actions.note: Jadar entered the battlefield. Stack is empty.
CR 116.3: Both players pass in PreCombatMain → advances to BeginningOfCombat (1 of 5).
CR 116.3: Both players pass in BeginningOfCombat → advances to DeclareAttackers (2 of 5).
CR 116.3: Both players pass in DeclareAttackers with no attackers declared. advance_step() skips to EndOfCombat (3 of 5).
CR 116.3: Both players pass in EndOfCombat → advances to PostCombatMain (4 of 5).

CR 116.3: Both players pass in PostCombatMain → advances to End step (5 of 5). enter_step() calls end_step_actions() which places Jadar's AtBeginningOfYourEndStep trigger on the stack via the generic carddef sweep.

script.step_note: P1's End step. Jadar's trigger is on the stack (PARTIAL FIX confirmed). Both players pass. Trigger resolves — but CreateToken effect is not executed due to remaining engine gap (resolution reads characteristics.triggered_abilities which is empty). See disputes.

actions.description: Jadar end-step trigger on stack (count=1). PARTIAL FIX confirmed: end_step_actions() generic sweep places the trigger on the stack.
actions.note: CR 603.1: Jadar's triggered ability fires at the beginning of P1's End step. The generic AtBeginningOfYourEndStep sweep in end_step_actions() places the trigger on the stack. Stack count = 1 — this assertion PASSES with the partial engine fix.

CR 116.3: Both players pass priority. CR 608.2: Jadar's end-step trigger resolves. REMAINING GAP: effect is not executed because resolution.rs reads characteristics.triggered_abilities (empty) instead of card_registry.

resolution.note: CR 111.1, 111.5: A 2/2 black Zombie creature token with Decayed should enter P1's battlefield. REMAINING GAP: engine does not execute this effect. See disputes.

actions.note: Informational: what should happen per CR. REMAINING GAP prevents token creation.

actions.description: After trigger resolves: stack empty, Jadar still on P1 battlefield. Zombie token should be present but is not due to remaining engine gap.
actions.note: Stack empties after trigger resolves (even though effect was not executed). Jadar remains. The Zombie token would have Decayed (CR 702.147a) but does not exist due to engine gap. Only asserting what the engine actually produces — Jadar on battlefield, empty stack, unchanged life totals.
CR 116.3: Both players pass in End step with empty stack. Turn advances to Cleanup then to P2's turn.
